headline: Here is why Emerson Electric Co. (EMR) is among the 7 Best Electrical Equipment Stocks to Buy
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding at 2.16%, Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) is among the 7 Best Electrical Equipment Stocks to Buy. headline: Earn 8.6% On EMR Stock By Selling Upside You Might Not Miss
summary: Get paid a guaranteed cash income on your Emerson Electric shares now, which you keep no matter what, just for agreeing to sell at a higher price if the stock gets there.

headline: Emerson Automates Refinery Scheduling to Improve Margins, Respond Faster to Market Volatility
summary: Global automation leader Emerson (NYSE: EMR) has introduced software that automates two of refining's most time-intensive and margin-critical processes: crude scheduling and product blending. The new solutions enable refineries to increase operating margins, improve efficiency and respond faster to market changes.
